  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "cmd.exe wrote a file named 'ntds_T1003' to the Temp directory. The filename 'ntds' suggests an attempt to access or exfiltrate the Active Directory database (NTDS.DIT), and 'T1003' is a MITRE ATT&CK ID for OS Credential Dumping. This is highly suspicious behavior for cmd.exe.",
